name: FunderUsers
description: Linkage table mapping a funder user's email to a funder. userEmail is stored trimmed + lowercased (canonical form used by usePersona() lookups). funderId is a FREE string reference for now — the Funders table does not exist yet (created in a later milestone), so no reference constraint is applied.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Item created at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Item updated at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: userEmail
columns.description: Funder user's email, stored trimmed + lowercased

columns.name: funderId
columns.description: Free reference to a funder (plain string until the Funders table exists)
